name: Caraway-Swiss Chicken on Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts, about 4 halves
2 ounces nonfat processed Swiss cheese, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain well.
2. Divide cooked spinach among 4 au gratin baking dishes.
3. Meanwhile, spray a cold large skillet with nonstick coating.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and cook over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender and no longer pink, turning pieces occasionally.
5. Place chicken atop the spinach in each dish. Keep warm.
6. For sauce, combine milk, cornstarch, bouillon, caraway, and pepper in a bowl. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
7. Add cheese and tabasco to the sauce; stir until melted.
8. Pour the sauce evenly over the chicken.
Per serving: 192 Kcal, 2.3g fat (0.6g sat fat), 11% CFF, 793mg Na
To FREEZE: Cool; cover with foil; label and freeze.
Conventional oven: Bake frozen casserole, covered at 375°F for 45-50 minutes or until hot.
Microwave: Remove foil from frozen casserole; cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave 1 serving at 70% (medium-high) for 6-7 minutes or until heated through, turning dish once.
